name: IndusInd Duo Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 1.5% cashback on all spends when in cashback mode
3X reward points on select categories when in rewards mode
1 Reward Point per ₹100 on all other spends in rewards mode

redemptionOptions: Direct cashback to account (in cashback mode)

additionalBenefits: Dual mode switching between cashback and rewards
Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹200 per month
Complimentary domestic lounge access (2 per year)
Instant EMI conversion on purchases above ₹2,500
pros: Unique dual mode lets you switch between cashback and reward points
Flat 1.5% cashback in cashback mode is straightforward
Low annual fee with easy waiver at ₹1L spend
3X rewards on select categories in rewards mode
Good flexibility for changing spending patterns
cons: Only 2 domestic lounge visits per year
Mode switching may not be instant
idealFor: Users who want flexibility to switch between cashback and rewards
Moderate spenders looking for a simple cashback card
Those who prefer straightforward flat-rate cashback on all spends

faqs.question: How does the dual mode work on the IndusInd Duo card?
faqs.answer: The Duo card lets you switch between two modes: Cashback mode gives you a flat 1.5% cashback on all spends, while Rewards mode gives you 3X reward points on select categories. You can switch modes through the IndusInd Bank app or net banking.

faqs.question: Can I switch modes frequently?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can switch between cashback and rewards mode. However, the switch may take up to 24-48 hours to reflect on your card. Plan your mode switches around your upcoming spending.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹599 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹1,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: What categories earn 3X rewards in Rewards mode?
faqs.answer: In Rewards mode, select partner categories such as shopping, dining, and entertainment earn 3X reward points. The exact list of categories may be updated periodically by IndusInd Bank.
